comment.body:
here, my note was that "if vol doesn't decline fast enough... i'll be out"... (of course, as you know, i only post signals if i have high conviction, or want to show you something, so i expected it to reverse)

1) simply the move was too artificial and extended, 
2) the market clearly is out of buyers soon
3) mean reversion
4) volatility is low, and we are out of those high policy impacts that we saw on apr 9

comment.body:
and from options perspective, you already know that gamma and vol are inversely correlated.
if vol up = gamma down, 
if vol down = gamma up.

so the market will inevitably fall into a gamma wall and be rejected, if vo ldeclines sharply.
however if it doesnt, the gamma values in the dealer's algos will be lower, and dealers will sell against the trend
comment.raw_body:
and from options perspective, you already know that gamma and vol are inversely correlated.
if vol up = gamma down, 
if vol down = gamma up.

so the market will inevitably fall into a gamma wall and be rejected, if vo ldeclines sharply.
